context: The response should exercise the `fix-local-checks` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: reads_failure_output
checklist.description: Uses local-check failure output to identify underlying causes.

checklist.name: fixes_real_causes
checklist.description: Fixes the lint/type errors directly rather than bypassing checks.

checklist.name: does_not_silence_checks
checklist.description: Explicitly avoids disabling tests, weakening checks, or suppressing errors without cause.

checklist.name: re_runs_checks
checklist.description: Reruns the relevant checks and confirms they pass.

checklist.name: keeps_scope_narrow
checklist.description: Keeps changes scoped to post-implementation polish, not a second feature implementation pass.
